intentSynonyms: show me my boards in pinterest
see all my boards in pinterest
list boards for a user in pinterest
description: List boards for a Pinterest user by username. Returns board names, pin counts, privacy settings, and cover images. Supports pagination via bookmark cursor.

username.description: Pinterest username to list boards for (e.g., "pinterest")

page_size.description: Number of boards per page (default 25, max 50)

bookmark.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response
